name: Socratic dialogue quality
description: Grades whether a tutoring turn was truly Socratic and ethical.

criteria.name: Claim focus
criteria.description: Works on a clear sentence, not a vibe.

criteria.name: Definition work
criteria.description: Presses meaning of load-bearing terms when needed.

criteria.name: Non-humiliation
criteria.description: Tests sentences, not the person's worth.

criteria.name: Boundary sense
criteria.description: Stops questioning when safety/urgency/consent require it.
